description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a rectangular footprint, featuring a flat, dark gray roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is accented by a balcony running the length of the upper floor, supported by white columns and railings, and a covered porch area below. Large windows are arranged in neat, horizontal rows on both levels, providing ample natural light. The property includes a paved driveway with two palm trees, a car parked to the side, and a backyard area with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and an umbrella. Surrounding the house are several trees, adding greenery and privacy to the setting. The overall design is clean and contemporary, with a focus on outdoor leisure and open sightlines.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a front balcony, and a backyard pool area, surrounded by trees and a paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, balcony, two palm trees, driveway, and part of the pool area to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, parked car, and the symmetrical window arrangement along the house's length.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard pool, lounge area, and the back balcony with trees on either side.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view focusing on the pool, umbrella, and the house's rear facade with visible balcony and windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a covered porch, white columns, balcony above, and wide steps leading to the main door.
